articles.title_en: Vietnam Inaugurates Major Can Tho Advanced Wastewater Treatment Plant, Boosting Mekong Delta's Water Quality
articles.summary_en: MONRE announced the completion of the Can Tho Advanced Wastewater Treatment Plant in early 2026, serving 1.5 million people and significantly improving water quality in the Mekong Delta region. This project underscores Vietnam's commitment to sustainable environmental management.

articles.title_en: MONRE Secures $500M Green Fund for National Water & Wastewater Treatment Expansion 2026-2030
articles.summary_en: Vietnam's Ministry of Natural Resources and Environment (MONRE) secured a landmark $500 million green fund in mid-2026 from international partners to accelerate national water and wastewater treatment infrastructure development, targeting 80% urban treatment capacity by 2030.

articles.title_en: Vietnam Unveils 'Smart Water 2030' Strategy, Pioneering AI in Wastewater Management by 2026
articles.summary_en: MONRE launched its 'Smart Water 2030' strategy in late 2026, emphasizing the integration of AI and IoT into urban wastewater treatment systems across Vietnam. The initiative aims to enhance efficiency, reduce operational costs, and improve environmental monitoring nationwide.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's Mandatory Waste Sorting Sees Mixed Results in Early 2026 Enforcement
articles.summary_en: Vietnam's mandatory household waste sorting faces initial hurdles but gains traction, vital for 2026 environmental goals.

articles.title_en: EPR Scheme Gathers Momentum in Vietnam, Shifting Responsibility to Producers
articles.summary_en: EPR scheme implementation in 2026 drives Vietnamese producers towards sustainable packaging and recycling.

articles.title_en: International Investors Eye Vietnam's Growing Waste-to-Energy Market Amidst Stricter Regulations
articles.summary_en: Stricter 2026 waste laws attract foreign investment into Vietnam's waste-to-energy and recycling infrastructure.

articles.title_en: ADB Approves $350M for Hanoi's Green Urban Transit Expansion
articles.summary_en: ADB's new loan boosts Hanoi's sustainable urban transport, aiming for cleaner, more efficient public transit by 2030.

articles.title_en: Vietnam Secures $280M ADB Loan for Mekong Delta Climate Adaptation
articles.summary_en: ADB loan targets critical infrastructure to enhance climate resilience and sustainable farming in Vietnam's Mekong Delta.

articles.title_en: ADB Commits $180M to Boost Northern Vietnam Digital Connectivity
articles.summary_en: ADB loan expands high-speed internet and digital services in rural northern Vietnam, fostering economic growth.

articles.title_en: ADB-Backed Mekong Delta Clean Water Project Nears 90% Completion, Benefiting Millions by 2026
articles.summary_en: ADB-funded Mekong Delta clean water project nears 90% completion, benefiting over 2M residents by 2026, boosting health & development.

articles.title_en: Vietnam Secures New ADB Loan for Northern Highlands Wastewater Treatment Expansion
articles.summary_en: Vietnam secures $120M ADB loan for Northern Highlands wastewater treatment expansion, enhancing urban sanitation and climate resilience.

articles.title_en: Sustainable Sanitation: ADB and Vietnam Partner for Post-2025 Strategic Framework
articles.summary_en: ADB and Vietnam launch post-2025 strategic framework for sustainable urban water, focusing on smart monitoring and circular economy by 2026.

articles.title_en: World Bank-Backed Vietnam Water Project Nears 2026 Completion, Benefiting Millions
articles.summary_en: Major phase of Vietnam's World Bank water project concludes by 2026, enhancing access and climate resilience for millions.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's Climate-Resilient Water Project Adapts to New Challenges in 2026
articles.summary_en: World Bank water project in Vietnam faces new climate challenges, prompting adaptive strategies for long-term sustainability.

articles.title_en: World Bank Explores Expanded Funding for Vietnam's Green Water Initiatives Post-2026
articles.summary_en: Discussions begin for expanded World Bank funding for Vietnam's next phase of climate-smart water and sanitation projects.

articles.title_en: JICA Pledges Billions for Vietnam's High-Speed Rail Network Expansion by 2026
articles.summary_en: JICA has committed a substantial ODA loan package to accelerate Vietnam's high-speed rail development, focusing on key northern and southern links by 2026, aiming to boost economic connectivity and reduce carbon emissions.

articles.title_en: Vietnam Secures JICA Grant for Mekong Delta Climate Resilience and Water Management Project
articles.summary_en: JICA awarded Vietnam a significant grant for a new Mekong Delta environmental initiative, targeting enhanced climate change adaptation, saline intrusion prevention, and sustainable water resource management.

articles.title_en: JICA Continues Robust ODA Support for Vietnam's Green Infrastructure and Urban Development
articles.summary_en: By mid-2026, JICA reaffirms robust ODA support for Vietnam's sustainable growth, channeling loans/grants into green urban infrastructure, renewable energy, and digital transformation, reinforcing bilateral cooperation.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's 'New-Gen' Industrial Parks Attract Record FDI in H1 2026, Driving Manufacturing Renaissance
articles.summary_en: Vietnam's specialized, eco-friendly industrial parks attracted record H1 2026 FDI, driven by tech and high-value manufacturing, solidifying its global production hub status.

articles.title_en: Strategic Infrastructure Projects Bolster Vietnam's Industrial Park Appeal, Eyes on Long Thanh Airport & Major Expressways in 2026
articles.summary_en: Progress on Long Thanh Airport and expressways significantly boosts Vietnam's industrial parks. These 2026 infrastructure investments are vital for logistics and attracting high-tech FDI.

articles.title_en: Green Investment Policies & Digital Infrastructure Underpin Vietnam's Sustainable FDI Strategy for 2026 and Beyond
articles.summary_en: Vietnam prioritizes sustainable, high-tech FDI with green incentives and expanded digital infrastructure in industrial zones. This 2026 strategy balances growth with environmental responsibility.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's Phu Quy Offshore Wind Project Breaks Ground, Kicking Off PDP8 Renewables
articles.summary_en: Phu Quy offshore wind farm begins construction, a major PDP8 milestone for Vietnam, backed by international investors.

articles.title_en: Vietnam Boosts Grid Capacity for Solar Integration Under PDP8 Mandate
articles.summary_en: Vietnam invests heavily in smart grids to integrate growing solar capacity, crucial for PDP8 renewable energy targets.

articles.title_en: International Firms Pledge Billions to Vietnam's PDP8 Renewable Energy Expansion
articles.summary_en: Global investors pour billions into Vietnam's wind and solar projects, validating PDP8's ambitious renewable energy strategy.

articles.title_en: Ben Luc-Long Thanh Expressway Opens, Boosts Long Thanh Airport Connectivity
articles.summary_en: Ben Luc-Long Thanh Expressway opens, enhancing Long Thanh Airport connectivity and Mekong Delta access. Phase 1 nears.

articles.title_en: HCMC Metro Line 1 Thriving, Long Thanh Airport Rail Link Studies Accelerate
articles.summary_en: HCMC Metro Line 1 successful. High-speed rail link studies for Long Thanh Airport connection accelerate.

articles.title_en: Long Thanh Airport Readies for Test Flights as Southern Transport Network Solidifies
articles.summary_en: Long Thanh Airport readies for test flights. Key expressways complete, solidifying southern transport.

articles.title_en: HCMC's 'Smart City Brain' 2.0: AI-Powered IOC Revolutionizes Urban Management
articles.summary_en: Ho Chi Minh City unveils its upgraded IOC, leveraging AI and 5G to optimize traffic, public safety, and urban services.

articles.title_en: Vietnam Accelerates Smart City Development with National Digital Infrastructure Rollout
articles.summary_en: Vietnam launches new Tier IV data centers and bolsters cybersecurity, solidifying its national smart city digital backbone.

articles.title_en: Da Nang's IOC Integrates Smart Energy and Environmental Monitoring, Sets New Standards
articles.summary_en: Da Nang’s IOC now fully manages smart energy grids and environmental sensors, showcasing advanced sustainable urban planning.
